category: Assign Machine Quantities To Output Channels
description: Use this API to add an output channel containing a plant related model variable of a designated type for a specified machine. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = machine_array_channel(status, id, ident)

parameters.name: ident
parameters.description: Identifier to be assigned to the channel. if a blank channel identifier is specified, the api generates an appropriate channel identifier. (input; blank by default).

status.description: starting channel index, or -1 for the next available (next available by default).
used to indicate the quantity to be placed in an channel (1 by default).
PELEC, machine electrical power (pu on SBASE).
PMECH, turbine mechanical power (pu on MBASE).
SPEED, machine speed deviation from nominal (pu).
VUEL, minimum excitation limiter output signal (pu).
VOEL, maximum excitation limiter output signal (pu).
WTRBSP, wind turbine rotor speed deviation (pu).
WPCMND, active power command from wind control (pu on MBASE).
WQCMND, reactive power command from wind control (pu on MBASE).
WAUXSG, output of wind auxiliary control (pu on MBASE).
number of the bus to which the machine for which the quantity is to be placed in an channel is connected (no default allowed).

error_codes.description: starting channel number is greater than the largest channel number allowed.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
